name: HRC_TXN_TAC_ESS
description: Transaction Model table: Table for storing the details of the ess job ran.

columns.Name: ID
columns.Comments: Unique ID which is used as a primary key

columns.Name: ESS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Indicates Unique identifier of the ess request identifier

columns.Name: JOBNAME
columns.Comments: To distinguish the records based on jobname

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: STARTTIME
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time the transaction ESS job began executing.

columns.Name: ENDTIME
columns.Comments: Indicates the date and time the transaction ESS job finished executing.

columns.Name: TRANSACTIONSPICKED
columns.Comments: Indicates the transactions handled by the the transaction ESS job.

columns.Name: TRANSACTIONSUPDATED
columns.Comments: Indicates the transactions updated by the the transaction ESS job.

columns.Name: LOGS
columns.Comments: Log files associated with the transaction ESS job run.

columns.Name: SUBMITTEDFROM
columns.Comments: Indicates whether ESS job was run from the ESS Scheduler or manually from the Transaction Console application.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the transaction ESS job.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
